LAW AND MOTION 302, APPELLANT LILLIE A. MOSADDEGH M.D. INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER FOR FAILURE BY RESPONDENT TO PROSECUTE, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN FOR THE RELIEF SOUGHT BY THE MOTION. DR. MOSADDEGH IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN HER FAVOR AND AGAINST RESPONDENT MARIO MORENO PROVIDING THAT THE DLSE ORDER OF MAY 6, 2016 IS VACATED AND THE BOND POSTED BY DR. MOSSADDEGH IS EXONERATED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment In Favor Of Petitioner For Failuer By Respondent To Prosecute, Or, In The Alternative, An Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

APPELLANT LILLIE A. MOSADDEGH M.D. INC.'s Motion For Judgment In Favor Of Petitioner For Failure By Respondent To Prosecute, Or, In The Alternative, An Order To Show Cause is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown for the relief sought by the motion. Dr. Mosaddegh is entitled to judgment in her favor and against respondent Mario Moreno providing that the DLSE order of May 6, 2016 is vacated and the bond posted by Dr. Mossaddegh is exonerated. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allison Ross, of Gordon & Rees LLP, Tel. 415.986.5900, for appellant/petitioners;
Michael L. Smith, of Department of Industrial Relations, Tel. 510.622.3246, for plaintiff/respondents.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. Mr. Moreno is not present, and the Court did not receive an objection. Attorney, Michael L. Smith's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD as to RESPONDENT MARIO MORENO, is granted. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
